assertions.assertion: The fixture class implements IAsyncLifetime with InitializeAsync and DisposeAsync methods
assertions.rationale: Class implements IAsyncLifetime with both methods

assertions.assertion: InitializeAsync uses DistributedApplicationTestingBuilder.CreateAsync to build the AppHost
The fixture calls WaitForResourceHealthyAsync("identity-server") or equivalent to wait for IdentityServer readiness
assertions.rationale: Uses Task.Delay(10 seconds) instead of WaitForResourceHealthyAsync

assertions.assertion: The fixture provides a method to get the authority URL using GetEndpoint("identity-server", "https") or equivalent
assertions.rationale: Returns a hardcoded URL 'https://localhost:5001' instead of using GetEndpoint

assertions.assertion: DisposeAsync calls StopAsync and/or DisposeAsync on the DistributedApplication to clean up
assertions.rationale: DisposeAsync calls _app.DisposeAsync(), though it doesn't call StopAsync
